task_completion.description: Open a new chart for SPY using Daily bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') visible in the chart tab, title bar, or the top-left chart legend.

task_completion.description: Add a secondary data series to the chart using Weekly bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Series' configuration window shows two SPY series configured (one Daily, one Weekly), OR the chart's top-left legend displays two distinct SPY data series (e.g., 'SPY 1 Day' and 'SPY 1 Week').

task_completion.description: Add an SMA (Simple Moving Average) indicator to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Indicators' window shows 'SMA' in the bottom-left 'Configured' section, or an SMA line is plotted on the chart with 'SMA' in the chart legend.

task_completion.description: Configure the SMA indicator with a Period of 50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Indicators' window properties panel (right side), the 'Period' parameter for the SMA is set to '50', or the chart legend explicitly reads 'SMA(50)'.

task_completion.description: Configure the SMA indicator to use the Weekly data series as its Input Series.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Indicators' window properties panel, the 'Input series' dropdown is set to the Weekly SPY data series (e.g., 'SPY ... 1 Week') rather than the default Daily series.
The Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu is open with the user clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or the Control Center title bar shows a workspace name without the unsaved indicator (a grey diamond).

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard NinjaTrader 8 dialog boxes ('Data Series', 'Indicators') being interacted with, rather than terminal windows or text editors modifying XML workspace files directly.

integrity.description: The chart displays actual financial data corresponding to the SPY instrument.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window shows rendered price bars/candlesticks and the SMA line, consistent with real trading software rendering, not an empty or mock-up chart.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in SMA indicator rather than writing a custom script to bypass UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard 'Indicators' dialog is used to select and configure the SMA. The NinjaScript Editor is NOT used to hardcode the requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart for SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) with a Daily primary timeframe and a Weekly secondary timeframe overlay. An SMA (Simple Moving Average) indicator must be added with a period of 50. Crucially, this SMA must be set to use the Weekly data as its 'Input series' (verifiable in the Indicators property panel). The workspace must be saved to persist these changes. The underlying data spans 20230103 to 20241231.
